---
title: SubtleTea Solutions
---


![](images/circle-logo-teacup-nowordmark.png){.float-left height=225px}

<p style="font-size: 14px">
**SubtleTea Solutions** is helps organizations coordinate sustainably:
communication, and change strategies using social science and
technology.
</p>



## Research

SubtleTea **Research** provides the computational, conceptual,
analytical, and methodological backbone for sustainable capacity in
organizations. Our research translates advanced cognitive, social, and
epidemiological science into practice.


## Intelligence & Education

SubtleTea **Intelligence** and **Education** offerings translate research into
decision support, custom analyses, and instruction that help organizations
build their own strategic capacity.


## Engagements

SubtleTea Solutions works on a limited number of high-trust engagements at a
time. Pricing reflects the strategic, reputational, and organizational stakes of
the work.


### Coaching and Advice

**Monthly Advisory Retainer**

- Strategic review and updates to communication materials
- Ongoing consultation on messaging, framing, and audience dynamics
- Includes up to **four hours** of one-on-one consulting per month

**\$1,000 / month**


### Social Strategy: Communication and Organization

**Communication and Social Strategy Report**

A ~2,000-word strategic analysis of messaging, audience structure, and
communication risk, grounded in established social science. Designed to identify
where language may polarize, misfire, or fail to travel—and how to correct it
*before* deployment.

From **\$15,000**

**Website & Public Communication Strategy**

- Foundational website: from **\$15,000** for three sections (e.g. Home, About, Team)
- Additional sections: **\$5,000** each
- Custom analytical figures or diagrams: **\$2,000** per figure


### Social Intelligence & Forensics

**Social Forensics Report**

An analytical assessment of observed social behavior to clarify underlying
motives, network dynamics, coordination failures, or sources of conflict. This
work is often used to understand why an organization, campaign, or community is
experiencing unexpected resistance or fragmentation.

~2,000-word report from **\$15,000**

## Custom Tools & Software

For some engagements, custom analytical or computational tools are the most
effective way to support decision-making. SubtleTea Solutions develops bespoke
software selectively, when it materially improves clarity or reduces risk.

Scope and pricing by consultation.

<hr class="hero-divider">
<br>
<div style="text-align: center;">
Academic and non-profit discounts are available. Please enquire.
</div>
